welcome.title: Guess The Prompt
welcome.subtitle: Put your imagination to the test
welcome.guestHint: Start in seconds. No account needed.
welcome.accountHint: Use an account only if you want to save your progress.

roomExit.title: Leave the match
roomExit.message: If you leave now, you will exit the current room.
roomExit.gameWarning: If fewer than 3 players remain after you leave, the match will end and everyone will be sent to the results screen.

home.stepsHint: Type your name, then create a room or join with a code.
home.nameHint: This is the name other players will see.
home.createHint: Choose this if you are hosting the game.
home.joinHint: Choose this if someone shared a room code with you.

lobby.title: Waiting Room
lobby.shareHint: Share this code with your friends so they can join.
lobby.inviteMessage: Join my Guess The Prompt room with code {{code}}
lobby.hostHint: When at least 3 players are ready, the host can start the game.
lobby.hostReady: Everyone is ready. You can start the game.
lobby.guestHint: Wait here until the host starts the game.
lobby.guestWaiting: Waiting for the host to start the game.
lobby.guestReadyHint: Mark yourself as ready so the host can start.
lobby.readySubmitted: You are ready. Waiting for the host.

game.generatorTitle: Create a card that makes sense
game.generatorHint: Describe a dreamy, poetic or strange scene. If you get stuck, use the suggestion button.
game.promptHint: The clearer the scene, the easier it is for the AI to interpret it well.
game.generatedHint: If this matches your idea, choose the card. If not, go back and try another variation.
game.galleryWildcardHint: You can spend one of your 3 match wildcards to play a card you already saved in your gallery.
game.galleryWildcardEmpty: You do not have any saved gallery cards yet.
game.wildcardSpendHint: The wildcard is only spent when you confirm this card.
game.narratorIntro: You set the tone for the round
game.narratorSelectHint: First choose a secret card that can inspire an interesting clue.
game.narratorClueHint: Now write a suggestive clue. It should guide players without giving away the answer.
game.narratorClueHelp: The best clue creates doubt. It should feel evocative, not too obvious.
game.writeClue: Write a clue for your card
game.playersIntro: Find a card that can mislead
game.playersHint: Choose an image that fits the narrator's clue without looking too obvious.
game.playersSelectedHint: Your card is ready. Press below to send it to the voting table.
game.voting: Vote! Which card is the narrator's?
game.votingHint: Look at every card, tap one option, then confirm your vote when you are sure.
game.voteSelectedHint: You already picked a card. If you are sure, confirm your vote.
game.resultsHint: Here you can see the narrator's real card and how the score changed after the round.
game.resultsNextHint: Once everyone has seen the outcome, continue to the next round.
game.waitingForNarrator: Waiting for the narrator to share the clue.
game.waitingNarratorTitle: The narrator is setting up the round
game.waitingNarratorBody: As soon as the clue is ready, you will be able to choose your card.
game.waitingSubmissionTitle: Waiting for the others to choose
game.waitingSubmissionBody: Hang on for a moment. Voting starts when every card is ready.
game.waitingPlayersTitle: Your card has already been sent
game.waitingPlayersBody: Now the others need to play theirs. Voting will start in a moment.
game.waitingVotesBody: Now we just need the other votes before showing the round result.
game.roundRecapNoSummary: The round is over. Standings are coming up next.
game.generationUnavailableNoTokens: Free generation spent and no tokens left

launcher.title: Add a tactic
launcher.body: Write your clue first. If you want to reinforce the round, activate a tactic before you submit it.
launcher.willLaunch: It will launch together with your clue.
launcher.wontLaunch: No tactic will be launched this round.

risk_normal.name: Normal risk
risk_normal.short: Balanced clue profile with no intuition cost.
risk_normal.detail: You keep the standard round profile and play a clue with a healthy amount of ambiguity.
risk_normal.reward: No resource cost and the usual scoring flow stays intact.
risk_normal.risk: You gain no extra edge if the table reads your clue immediately.

risk_sniper.name: Sniper risk
risk_sniper.short: Spend 1 INT on a very precise clue that should only land for a few players.
risk_sniper.detail: You aim for a narrow mental target and try to make the round land on a single reader.
risk_sniper.reward: Potentially higher upside if almost everyone misses except one player.
risk_sniper.risk: If you overfocus the clue, nobody follows it and the round slips away.

risk_narrow.name: Narrow risk
risk_narrow.short: Spend 1 INT to tighten the clue and force a narrower table read.
risk_narrow.detail: You intentionally shrink the space of possible readings to create a more controlled table split.
risk_narrow.reward: Lets you push a more specific outcome with tighter control over the table.
risk_narrow.risk: A clue that is too narrow can become obvious or simply stop working.

risk_ambush.name: Ambush
risk_ambush.short: Spend 2 INT to force a far more aggressive clue line.
risk_ambush.detail: You unlock an offensive tactic that tries to disrupt the table's expected reading.
risk_ambush.reward: Higher upside than the default line when the trap lands well.
risk_ambush.risk: You spend intuition up front and may get nothing back if the table stays stable.

corrupted_card.name: Corrupted card
corrupted_card.short: Spend intuition to open a sabotage-flavored extra option.
corrupted_card.detail: You add a corrupted card route to create noise and break obvious choice patterns.
corrupted_card.reward: Gives you one more misleading angle and can scramble the vote.
corrupted_card.risk: It costs resources and a poor read can expose your whole plan.

bet_1.name: Bet x1
bet_1.short: Risk 1 intuition to back your read.
bet_1.detail: If you feel confident, invest a single intuition to increase the value of your vote.
bet_1.reward: A correct read pays better than a normal vote.
bet_1.risk: If you miss, the intuition is gone.

bet_2.name: Bet x2
bet_2.detail: This is the aggressive version of the bet: more cost, more exposure, more swing.
bet_2.reward: A correct read pays more than the light bet.
bet_2.risk: A miss burns 2 intuition at once.

challengeLeader.name: Challenge leader
challengeLeader.short: Target the solo leader and try to close the gap.
challengeLeader.detail: You activate a special challenge against the player holding first place alone. It can only be used once per match.
challengeLeader.reward: A strong round gives you an extra route to pressure the standings.
challengeLeader.risk: You spend intuition and the challenge can backfire if the round goes cold.

notes.onlyNarratorRisk: Only the narrator can choose risk profiles in this phase.
notes.noCorruptedCardsLeft: You have no corrupted cards left.
notes.challengeSpent: You already used challenge leader in this match.
notes.challengeNoLeader: There is no solo leader to challenge.
notes.challengeSelfLeader: You cannot challenge yourself while leading.
notes.challengeNeedIntuition: You need 1 intuition to activate the challenge.

gallery.title: My gallery
gallery.noCards: You have no cards yet. Generate your first!
gallery.capacity: You can keep up to {{count}} cards.
gallery.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this card?
gallery.guestWallTitle: Create an account to save your cards
gallery.guestWallBody: The gallery is only available for registered accounts. Your progress as a guest is not saved between sessions.

profile.title: Profile
profile.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
profile.upgradeExplain: Your current account is temporary. Add an email and password so you do not lose your progress.
profile.avatarHint: Choose one of your gallery cards and use it as your profile image.
profile.emailVerify: Check your email to confirm the change

reason.hostCancelledSelfBody: The room was closed before the match started.
reason.hostCancelledOtherBody: The host closed the room before the match started.
reason.allPlayersLeftSelfBody: Everyone else had already left the room.
reason.allPlayersLeftBody: The room was closed because nobody was left inside.
reason.tooFewPlayersSelfBody: After you left, there were not enough players left to keep playing.
reason.tooFewPlayersTitle: The match ended due to too few players
reason.tooFewPlayersBody: A player left and there were not enough players left to continue the match.
reason.roomFinishedBody: The match reached its natural end and these are the final results.
reason.invalidBody: The room no longer exists or its final state could not be recovered.
reason.defaultBody: The match ended and you can review the final results here.

errors.AI_CONFIG_ERROR: The AI provider is not configured on the server.
errors.PROMPT_SUGGEST_FAILED: We could not suggest an idea right now.
errors.PROMPT_REFINEMENT_FAILED: We could not prepare the card description.
errors.IMAGE_PROVIDER_FAILED: We could not generate the image.
errors.TEMP_DOWNLOAD_FAILED: The generated image could not be downloaded correctly.
errors.TEMP_UPLOAD_FAILED: We could not save the temporary image.
errors.TEMP_URL_SIGN_FAILED: We could not prepare the temporary image preview.
errors.GALLERY_LIMIT_REACHED: You already reached the 8-card gallery limit.
errors.NO_WILDCARDS_LEFT: You already spent your 3 wildcards in this match.
errors.NO_TOKENS_LEFT: You have no generation tokens left.
errors.INVALID_GALLERY_CARD: The selected gallery card is invalid.
errors.MISSING_ROOM_CONTEXT: Round card generation is missing room context.
errors.PLAYERS_NOT_READY: All guests must be ready before starting
errors.phaseCrashTitle: This phase ran into an error
errors.phaseCrashBody: Something failed in this part of the match. Please try again or reload the room.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
